Tranquil Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 29 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: One Hundred Blows (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

MightilyOats
Scholar
66 posts
But it is the rarest thing I've ever camped in this game in my life, and it took 5, 12+ hour days of non-stop camping to see this once.

Have had as many as 4 skeletal warlords up at once, and of course when there was a bunch of them, nothing happened

▲ Page top
stun max level of 55?
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2006 at 2:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364183849
Scholar
26 posts
I've seen a few references to a maximum level that the stun proc will work on is level 55. However, I've reviewed the spell details under LUCY and cannot find any supporting data to this claim. Can anyone with a tranquil staff, ton po's staff or fabled tranquil staff reply with details about the max level for the stun proc?

-Netherworld
▲ Page top
stun max level of 55?
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2006 at 11:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593375380220
26 posts
When you Duel or go PVP there is no level restrictions on who the stun will land on. I dueled a level 70 Paladin once and the stuns landed just fine.

Against NPCs the level cap is 55.

That help??
▲ Page top
stun max level of 55?
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2006 at 11:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593375380220
26 posts
The effect has been changed. The monk 1.5, 2.0 and this weapon had the stun proc modified so that you could no longer get stun lock on someone in PVP. In PVP there has never been a level cap for this effect. I was dueling a level 70 Paladin once and the stuns were landing just fine. But aginst NPCs the stun portion of the effect was capped at level 55.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 10 2004 at 6:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is the final post about pvp/resist all of your questions will be answered here.
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 05 2003 at 5:37 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) your all morons this drops off drovlog warlord ... not skeletal
RE: proc?
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2003 at 11:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763043733
107 posts
check lucy. lucy.fnord.net for proc levels. it's listed on all weapons there. much quicker
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 15 2003 at 6:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) A friend sent me this... dunno who wrote it.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 23 2003 at 9:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ROFLMAO!!!!!!!!!!!
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 15 2003 at 4:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Just a few days ago i saw this item in bazaar for 15kpp... i knew it goes for like twice that so i went over and bought it. Sold it the next day for 30k so that was nice profit... few days later i saw the item AGAIN for 13500.. so i ran over and bought it again... Gave up on trying to sell it after about 2 weeks and gave it to a really nice level 18 monk i met a few days earlier... turns out this was a 10 year old kid and told his dad (who plays a 65 warrior) about it... few hours later his dad logged on and gave me 250k for being so nice to his son......... Being nice always pays off =)
Is it good on non pvp..
QuoteReply
# May 08 2003 at 12:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760095246
View User Forum
6 posts
I was wondering if this is a good weapon to buy if you play on a non pvp server and why? thanks
▲ Page top
rsome stuff i learn about this wep
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 1:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771273552
54 posts
I got this staff from my rl friend.
It is 29 30 10wt proc 100 blows.
I have fought Tunare - idol statue AoW
and non resisted....it proc 75dd in pvp and stunn las 12 sec.Now people who say this wep is only for twinks are wrong. T staff is one of the best pvp weps in the game for monks..Now dont flame im not on a pvp server but do pvp alot in arna.And i also have FoN form tunare and SoM from kael but this is alot better for pvp one proc + innerflame = dead caster or melee with alot less hp only thing wrong with this wep in pvp is people spin and can still repoist used to just stand still :( Vishish Bloodshedder TP server
